#  Deactivate or Reactivate a User in Your Free Procore Account (Android) 
##### Limited Release
The Team tool is currently only available to users in the United States who have a free Procore account via the [Procore Construction Network](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-procore-construction-network).
##  Things to Consider 
  * To have a free Procore account, become a part of the [Procore Construction Network ](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-procore-construction-network)(PCN).
  * To add a user in the Team tool, their email domain must match your company's email domain.
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'System Administrator' permissions for the Procore Construction Network account.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Team** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.  
_Note:_ Find the 'Team' tool on any of your app's main pages: Sidebar screen, Home screen, or Project Overview screen.
  2. Click the name of the user that you want to edit information for.
  3. Choose one of the following options:
     * Click the **Deactivate** button
       * Click **Deactivate** again. Deactivated users cannot log into their Procore account, but they remain listed in projects. You can reactivate them later.
     * Click the **Reactivate** button if the user is already deactivated and you want to restore their access to your Procore Team.
       * Click **Reactivate** again. This restores their access to their Procore account, with the same projects and permissions.
  4. Click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [View Users in Your Free Procore Account (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/team-android/tutorials/view-users-in-your-free-procore-account-android)
  * [Team (Android) - Overview](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/team-android)
  * [Search for and Filter Users in Your Free Procore Account (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/team-android/tutorials/search-for-and-filter-users-in-your-free-procore-account-android)
title: Deactivate or Reactivate a User in Your Free Procore Account (Android)
description: How to deactivate or reactivate a Team user in the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
